relatability_triggers: A staggering 76 percent of Americans suffer from 'senior moments,' including memory lapses and decreased alertness!

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: PS (Phosphatidylserine) from Soy: PS is a nutrient made from soy that nourishes your brain and slows mental decline. This amazing nutrient is vital for avoiding and even improving age-related mental decline because it: Bathes and rejuvenates membranes of your brain cells. Transfers electrical impulses in your brain more easily. Supercharges cell membranes in your brain to work like they did when you were younger. Stimulates neurotransmitters that are essential for good memory. What most people don't know is that as you age, your body's PS levels decline and your cells' membranes become brittle. But if you take PS every day, you can roll back cognitive decline by up to 12 years. Picture how good you'd feel if you could think as keen and sharp as you did 12 years ago. Stanford University researchers led by Dr. Thomas H. Crook III compared effects of PS and placebo on 149 people, ages 50-75, suffering typical symptoms of age-related mental decline. Participants took 300mg of PS daily, or placebo, for 12 weeks. Those taking PS showed 30% improvement in cognitive function including learning, memory, and recalling numbers, names, and faces. Those who had lowest scores prior to taking PS had the best scores after. By comparing these results to expected mental decline data of thousands of subjects, Dr. Crook concluded that PS helped roll back 12 years of memory decline! PS is vital because most of the chemical transmitter activity of your brain occurs in the membranes, and your brain has energy shortages similar to electrical 'blackouts' as membranes become brittle with age. Remarkably, PS does wonders for your brain and for slowing and even improving memory loss. PS helps scrub the rust off your brain (lipofuscin greenish-brown slime that forms on neurons). PS is most important nutrient you can take to build up nerve cell membranes and boost your brain's performance. PS helps your body build thousands of vibrant, healthy new brain cells at any age. In fact, PS is already reversing symptoms for tens of thousands of patients.

lead.full_text: A staggering 76 percent of Americans suffer from 'senior moments,' including memory lapses and decreased alertness! But now, you don't have to suffer the same fate with the powerful nutrient that can give you dramatic improvement in your memory and thinking skills. If you ever worry about a failing memory... ordinary forgetfulness... cloudy thinking... or losing your freedom and independence because of age-related mental decline, this may be the most important Special Report you'll ever read. Why? For three important reasons. One: You'll discover that most doctors and most conventional medical treatments offer you little or no hope for age-associated memory problems. Ask your doctor what to do for a 'dull' brain, and the answer you'll probably get is, 'That's normal as you age.' As you'll see, that's HOGWASH! Two: You'll discover the hidden reasons why so many Americans are suffering from mental 'power outages,' even as early as age 30. The fact is, your brain changes with age and is constantly being hammered by free radicals, prescription medications, stress, and/or invisible toxins in your food, water, and air. As you'll see, there's now a natural solution for these problems. Three: You'll discover a natural health phenomenon hailed as 'the miracle brain booster' called PS-Ultimate Brain Food™.

Brain has energy shortages like electrical blackouts. Brain begins to 'rust' from free radicals and toxic sludge in food/water/air. key_proof_elements.Stanford_12_year_rollback: Led by Dr. Thomas H. Crook III, 149 people ages 50-75 with age-related memory decline, 300mg PS daily or placebo for 12 weeks. PS group showed 30% improvement in cognitive function (learning, memory, recalling numbers/names/faces). Those with lowest scores before PS had best scores after. Comparing to expected decline data of thousands of subjects, Dr. Crook concluded PS helped roll back 12 years of memory decline. Dr. Crook: 'By far the best of all the drugs and nutritional supplements we have ever tested for retarding Age-Associated Memory Impairment (AAMI).'
key_proof_elements.Italian_44_percent_improvement: University of Catania 170 patients with moderate cognitive deterioration, 300mg PS or placebo for 90 days, neuropsychological tests at beginning/45 days/90 days. Results: PS patients substantially outperformed placebo on 5 out of 5 memory tests (100% score!). PS improved memory in semantic association ability and verbal fluency by whopping 44%. After 45 days 23.5% improvement, after 90 days 44% improvement.
key_proof_elements.33_percent_smarter: Memory Assessment Clinic study tested PS vs placebo for learning and remembering written information. After 12 weeks, patients taking PS showed 33% greater improvement than placebo.
key_proof_elements.Daily_living_improvement: Vanderbilt/Memory Assessment/Ex Pharma Italy study, 51 subjects ages 55-85, 300mg PS or placebo 12 weeks. PS group showed 'significant improvement' in: remembering names of familiar people, recalling locations of frequently misplaced objects, recalling details of events from previous day, recalling details of events from past week. Better memory, better recall, better thinking, better living.
key_proof_elements.Quality_of_life_49_ways: University of Liege Belgium, 35 hospitalized patients ages 65-91 with mild to moderate memory and cognitive loss, 300mg PS or placebo for 6 weeks, evaluated on three kinds of tests (Crichton Scale, Peri Scale, psychometric circle-crossing test). Result: PS group improved in all three rating scales including all 49 items of daily-living activities.
key_proof_elements.PET_scan_visual_proof: Before PS: 'dead' areas of brain mean devastation of memory loss (images shown). After PS: lights up even 'dead' brain cells. People taking PS for few months seeing 'dead' areas on their brains light up - now have right chemistry to improve metabolism. PS not only showed significantly greater brain activation, they performed better on test. One clinical study documented PS increases generation of beneficial 'alpha waves' in brain by up to 20%.
key_proof_elements.Annie_74_miracle: Annie T. Arizona age 74, brain fell asleep, didn't remember devoted husband Del when he visited nursing home (crushing blow). Del started giving Annie just 2 capsules PS - miracle happened, she woke up.
key_proof_elements.3_day_result: Donald S. Aurora Colorado age 68, cynic frustrated with forgetting names and circumstances, short-term memory much to be desired. Began taking PS. key_proof_elements.Medical_doctor_validation: Dr. O.A. Barnhill age 79: 'PS is very helpful in restoring and retaining memory. I am 79 and I can tell a great deal of difference when I don't take PS.' Dr. L. De Rosis: 'I am trying PS on my geriatric patients who are undergoing various types of memory loss. Some are long range, some intermediate, some very short range (5-15 minutes).
